content:
# Cross Gradient

**Summary**: A constraint used in joint inversion to ensure that different physical properties share the same structural boundaries.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] applied cross-gradient constraints to link DCR and SR models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] Used to ensure structural consistency between resistivity and velocity models.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] Included in the joint inversion objective function as a cross-gradient term.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The cross-gradient approach has been adapted for the joint inversion of different geophysical data. ([[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023, p. 27]])
